text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
One of my juniors keeps failing her<n>tests... It's
honestly impressive.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But that just makes teaching them all the<n>more
rewarding. I must be thorough...<n>flawless in my
methods.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All right, I've already discerned her<n>weakest
areas, so let's create a few<n>problems for her to
work on. Then we<n>can begin studying tonight!
